archetype_description: Organic & Earthy mixed with Luxury. High-end editorial feel with cinematic scrolling.

motion.global: Lenis smooth scrolling is mandatory for the entire app wrapper. It provides the high-class cinematic feel requested.
motion.scroll_reveal: framer-motion whileInView={{ y: 0, opacity: 1 }} initial={{ y: 40, opacity: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.8, ease: [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1] }} viewport={{ once: true, margin: '-100px' }}
motion.parallax: Use framer-motion useScroll and useTransform for slow image y-axis movement within fixed overflow-hidden containers to simulate parallax.
motion.hover: Images scale up slightly on hover transition-transform duration-700 ease-out hover:scale-105

components.navbar: Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FAF8F5]/80 border-b border-[#E5E0D8]/50 sticky top-0 z-50.
components.hero: Cinematic full-height (min-h-[90vh]). Large background image with max bg-black/40 overlay. Text is center-aligned, massive serif heading.
components.marquee: react-fast-marquee. Low contrast: bg-[#E5E0D8] text-[#1A2F24]. Font: Cormorant Garamond, text-xl, gap-32. Drifting text like 'Freshly Sourced • Wholesale Pricing • Pan-India Delivery'
components.buttons: rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-colors duration-300. Primary: bg-[#1A2F24] text-[#FAF8F5] hover:bg-[#2C4A3A]. Secondary: border border-[#1A2F24] text-[#1A2F24] hover:bg-[#1A2F24] hover:text-[#FAF8F5].
components.cards: Flat surfaces with minimal borders. bg-white border border-[#E5E0D8] p-6. No heavy drop shadows, use subtle hover lifts (-translate-y-1).

hero_arch.description: Elegant white and beige floral arrangement. Use for the main hero background.

wholesale_market.description: Vibrant wholesale flower market. Use for the 'About' or 'Wholesale Pricing' section.

wedding_category.description: Elegant wedding floral setup. Use for the Wedding category bento card.

product_roses.description: Pink roses. Use for product thumbnails or featured products.

pages_to_build: Home (Hero, Marquee, Categories Grid, Featured Products, Wholesale CTA)
Product Detail (Images, Bulk vs Retail pricing, Add to Cart)
critical_rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case based on role (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-button').
Never use purple or teal. Stick strictly to the defined color palette.
Do NOT use Inter, Roboto, or generic sans for headings. Use Cormorant Garamond.
